data.content: Patched HistoryDebugPanel submission failure handling so thrown startSession errors are converted into a user-facing error, debug status flips to error, and the form always leaves the submitting state. Added a unit test covering the thrown startSession path. Validation in /Users/cartine/foolery-wt-foolery-742c: bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint (passes with existing repo warnings), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
